title: Folding roof system for pergolas and tents
abstract: The invention is about the system which shows more functional opening and closing feature and allows the ceiling to be opened or closed completely and/or at a desired opening, by using panels with particular dimensions instead of fabric on the pergolas and awnings with folding ceiling system, in order to protect the places they are applied against the summer and winter conditions.
claims: Claims 1. The invention is a featured folding ceiling system for indoor and outdoor pergolas and awnings and is characterized by containing; panels (10) placed consecutively between two side profiles (110), motion bar 2 (50) connected with carrier car (90) which transmits the motion necessary to rotate the said panel (10) around itself, wheel 2 (70) positioned inside the carrier car (90) which the said motion bar 2 (50) is connected, wheel 1 (60) positioned inside the carrier car (90) which is connected with the said wheel 2 (70), motion bar 1 (40) which is connected with the said wheel 1 (60) and each carrier car (90) is positioned, transmission rod 2 (30.1) which transmits the force obtained from engine 2 (30) to motion bar 1 (40), transmission rod 1 (20.1) which transmits the force obtained from engine 1 (20) to the belt wheel (80) which is connected with the belt which each carrier car (90) is connected and which provides forward and backward movement of the carrier car (90) on the motion bar 1 (40). 2. According to claim 1, it is a functional folding ceiling system and is characterized by containing panels (10) which have a panel slot (10.1) on one side and a panel tab (10.2) on the other side. 3. According to claim 1, it is a functional folding ceiling system and is characterized that during closing the ceiling, panel tab (10.2) of the rear panel (10) fits on panel slot (10.1) of the front panel (10).
